methodology: 6/3/3 TRAIN(2020-01..07)/VAL(..10)/OOS(..2021-01); all-weather=2020bull/2021mixed/2022bear rolling-from-band ensemble; ironed sleeve trail(0.10)+min_hold(12)+lag1+MAKER(0.0006RT); fixed-EW fillna(0).mean u10

per_tf.notes: Lowest bear loss (-15.1%) and best DD preservation (-15.5% vs BH -71%). Coarse trend follower misses short moves (coverage 23%). Best all-weather risk-adjusted but low participation.
Best balance: 46% coverage, good participation 2020/2021, moderate bear loss. Full band (120 configs). Classic swing EMA sweet spot.
Highest OOS net (29.5%) and 2020 participation (63.2%). Good move-catch with entry lag 0.65. Bear preserves to -22.4%. Strong overall profile.
Best p05 (-6.6%) = most consistent downside. Best move-capture at 0.297/0.337. Coverage 59%. Bear begins to hurt (-28%). High turnover 112 RT/yr.
Bear damage severe (-50.2%). OOS net drops to 18.1%, p05 worsens to -13.9%. Cost erosion begins (183 RT/yr). Fine TF EMA starts to fail in bear.
Smallest band (65 configs). Worst p05 (-18.5%), worst bear (-49.1%), highest turnover (258 RT/yr). Move-capture raw is decent but costs + bear erode gains heavily.
